entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cultivated variety of chickpea susceptible to pod borer

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES OF CHICKPEA
entities.description: Wild species related to chickpea used as sources of resistance

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The pod borer pest that attacks chickpea

entities.name: POD BORER RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist attack by Helicoverpa armigera

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL COMPONENTS
entities.description: Chemical substances in plants that confer resistance to pests

entities.name: LARVAL SURVIVAL
entities.description: The rate at which larvae of H. armigera survive

entities.name: PUPATION
entities.description: The process of transforming from larva to pupa in H. armigera

entities.name: ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: The process of adult moths emerging from pupae

entities.name: LARVAL WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of H. armigera larvae

entities.name: PUPAL WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of H. armigera pupae

entities.name: LARVAL DEVELOPMENTAL PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of the larval stage of H. armigera

entities.name: PUPAL DEVELOPMENTAL PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of the pupal stage of H. armigera

entities.name: FECUNDITY
entities.description: The reproductive rate of H. armigera

entities.name: PROTEINS
entities.description: Biochemical components negatively correlated with larval weight, pupation, and adult emergence

entities.name: PHENOLS
entities.description: Biochemical components negatively correlated with larval weight, pupation, adult emergence, pupal weight, and fecundity, and positively correlated with pupal period

entities.name: TOTAL SOLUBLE SUGARS
entities.description: Biochemical components negatively correlated with larval period and positively correlated with pupation and pupal weight

entities.name: TANNINS
entities.description: Biochemical components positively correlated with larval weight, pupation, and adult emergence

entities.name: FLAVONOID COMPOUNDS
entities.description: A group of biochemical compounds that negatively affect the survival and development of H. armigera

entities.name: CHLOROGENIC ACID
entities.description: A specific flavonoid compound identified via HPLC

entities.name: FERULIC ACID
entities.description: A specific flavonoid compound identified via HPLC

entities.name: NARINGIN
entities.description: A specific flavonoid compound identified via HPLC

entities.name: 3,4-DIHYDROXY FLAVONES
entities.description: A specific flavonoid compound identified via HPLC

entities.name: QUERCETIN
entities.description: A specific flavonoid compound identified via HPLC

entities.name: NARINGENIN
entities.description: A specific flavonoid compound identified via HPLC

entities.name: GENISTEIN
entities.description: A specific flavonoid compound identified via HPLC

entities.name: BIOCHANIN-A
entities.description: A specific flavonoid compound identified via HPLC

entities.name: FORMONONETIN
entities.description: A specific flavonoid compound identified via HPLC

entities.name: HPLC
entities.description: High-performance liquid chromatography used for fingerprinting flavonoid compounds

entities.name: CHICKPEA BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs aimed at developing cultivars with durable resistance to H. armigera
